'''Wurth Skidder''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who [[Death/Legends|died]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Biography==
Skidder studied under [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], and was one of the older [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] in the class above the [[Solo family/Legends|Solo children]]. In [[20 ABY/Legends|20 ABY]], with many of the senior [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] at the [[Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade|wedding]] of [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] and Luke Skywalker on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], he and [[Ganner Rhysode]] were left in charge of the Praxeum. In the early phases of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Wurth Skidder was one of [[Kyp Durron]]'s protégés and supporters. Skidder's rash actions in the [[Osarian]]-[[Rhommamool/Legends|Rhommamool]] [[Osarian-Rhommamool conflict|conflict]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] helped save [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] from her attackers, but only fueled hostilities between the neighboring worlds.

In the [[Battle of Ithor]], Wurth was one of many Jedi to defend the ''[[Tafanda Bay]]''. He fought valiantly, but suffered a severe fracture to his arm from a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[amphistaff]]. In the months after Ithor, Wurth found his way back to the frontlines on [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]]. He helped [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] troops fend off Yuuzhan Vong ground forces from inside his commandeered [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] until he had to retreat. Leia Organa Solo was on Gyndine, helping with the evacuation, when Skidder arrived. She tried to convince him to join her aboard the transports, but after promising to come back, Skidder disappeared and missed his ride. Wurth allowed himself to be captured.

He was put aboard a [[yammosk]] carrier ship known as [[Crèche (clustership)|''Crèche'']] commanded by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Chine-kal]]. The vessel was carrying [[Randa Besadii Diori|Randa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], and Wurth was put to work massaging the yammosk's tentacles. He used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to connect to the yammosk's mind and tried to persuade it that Randa was going to betray Chine-kal, but the yammosk saw through his lie and alerted Chine-kal of his being a Jedi. He was then "broken" by the Yuuzhan Vong after being tortured.

Wurth later died after [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] Kyp Durron and fellow Knight Ganner Rhysode tried to rescue him as they blasted their way through the ship's hull with the [[Kyp's Dozen|Dozen-and-Two Avengers]] and fought off many Yuuzhan Vong. Wurth knew it was too late and had them rescue the other prisoners, including [[Roa]]. By the time Kyp and Ganner reached him, Wurth Skidder was already too far gone.
